name: Chewy Brownies from _100% Pleasure_
recipeInstructions:
Note: These brownies are low-fat (23%) and low cholesterol. This recipe makes 12 bars at 167 calories each. Preheat oven to 350°F.
Line an 8-inch square pan with aluminum foil, overlapping at the two ends by 1 1/2".
Spray the foil with non-stick spray.
Sift together the first four ingredients onto wax paper.
Combine chocolate and margarine in a saucepan over the lowest heat,
Stir until smooth. From: Emory!rahul.Net!watson@sunshine.E
